transcript.text:
8?!
8 servings of meat?!
(Operation)
(Wipe Out All Shabu-shabu)
She's eating alone?!?
My goodness...
(All of that...?)
No one ever did that before..!
(I guess...)
(She's truly one of a kind....)
(Goosebumps)
(They told me to enjoy it, so I did...)
(At a commercial building in Yeouido)
Hello everyone
I'm in Yeouido today
I never knew this area had so many must-visit restaurants

that's been here for quite a long time
So I'm visiting one of the places..
that's well known for mushroom shabu-shabu
(Waiting in lines to get a taste of the food) It's a famous place that's been here for more than 30 years
(The commercial building theory) I'm expecting a lot today
because every restaurant in a commercial building turned out to be great
(B1 of Hongwoo Building) Here we are!
Gayang Kalguksu Beoseonmaeuntang* *Mushroom stew
Beoseonmaeuntang*! *Mushroom stew
Whoa, they've been here since 1988
That's almost 35 years now
And I'm actually a fan of these shabu-shabu dishes
(Proof that their food is great...!) It's just one menu here!
(Taking orders) I think I've seen you on TV!
Oh really?
Eh...

Mukbang!
Yeah, that's the one!
(July 2nd, 2021 Bar Rice Cake Mukbang) Didn't you eat bar rice cake or something?
On a large tray
- They were very long! - Yeah, I did that before
(You ate heaps...!) With deep fries as well!
Yeah
How many servings are there in a pot?
- Up to 4 servings - 4 servings?
Then I'll have 4 servings of mushroom stew
and extra 8 plates of beef
8?!
- 8 servings of meat?! - Yeah!
That's a lot you know...?
(No problem) I'll be fine!
What about you, producer?!

I won't be eating!
She's eating alone?!?
I'll be eating alone
Really?!
And I'll be eating noodles and porridge as well
My goodness...
(We should be quick...)
(Beef is served)
Thank you!
Thank you!
(If it takes just 6 plates to fill the table...)
(8 servings might just break it...!)
That looks awesome!
(Let's open it!)
So that's how it looks!
It's got heaps of mushrooms

And some sauce in it
The potatoes look good
(Waiting for the broth to boil...)
(Explosion)
(Broth deluge)
(I let my guard off...) It overflowed..my gosh
Ugh, it overflowed!!
(It's a water park!) I should scrape up
the bottom with a ladle...
(The smell of the stew is really appetizing...!)
How refreshing!
I can taste the minced garlic in there!
I guess that's why it's refreshing
Oh wow, the soup is really great!!
(Eyes wide open) The smell
The smell of mushrooms is really savory

It's spicy and refreshing...
It's just great!
Wow, I really like this
Now let's get one plate in
This one first!
Push it!
(In it goes!)
(Beef Shabu-shabu packed with mushroom flavor) This is awesome!
I can tell they serve quality meat as well
The color looks great
That's quality food right there
Whoa, it's so good
It does taste great too
It's got a chewy texture
and doesn't smell at all
The scent of it is just great

Awesome!
Oh my, the broth is...
Just perfect
(Loving it) It's the kind of flavor that I like
Let's get it out of there
I think wrapping it with mushrooms will be great
You gotta get this kind of food during the winter
It really warms you up!
(One plate is quite a lot) That's a lot
It just keeps coming!
Found more!
(Heaps) Heaps of beef!
(Thumbs up)
If you wrap it
with mushrooms like this, it's really great
I took the water parsley out

But if you like them, I bet you'll really love this dish
Get them like this!
It's great
The crunchy texture of mushrooms
and the chewy texture of beef really goes well together
(Cleared the first plate)
(Braising it)
It gets cooked quicker down there
(Done)
Wow, that's nice
(Taking out the second round of beef)
Let's start digging in!
(This might be hot...!)
Let's cool it off now
(Stir it)
(Dalgona / Stew version) Looks like dalgona from the Squid Game

Get it in there
Wow, that's great!
I like this way of eating
Dip it in the broth like this
Just a little bit!
It's strange that I keep crying during the winter times
(What a sentimental season....) The tears just come out
Oh my...
You have to pay for extra beef
But for veggies...
(It's free!) rice, and noodles, they're all free!
Potatoes!
Potatoes
(Searching for the potatoes...) I wonder if the potatoes are done
(Satisfied) It came out so well
I think I can split it like this

(Split)
It's well cooked
I'll cool it off for a bit
Let's see how many seconds it takes
(Skipped 2 seconds LOL)
(Nope) It's not done yet!
(You have to cook it right...hehe)
Oh! It's all cooked now!
Because they're freshly boiled
They taste really great
(Gotta be swift) I'll just eat it fresh out of the pot
Instead of cooking all of them
Boiling them one by one tastes better
It's so chewy and nice
But I can't do this all day!
(I'd rather just stuff it all in...LOL) Let's get them all in!

Whoa, this can't get any better
I really love potatoes that are in a stew
Whoa, it's great
(Getting every piece of meat out..)
Are you seeing this?!
(Heaps of meat)
(Hold up)
I'll stop once I get here
I'll eat this with chopped noodles
and this one with porridge
(Porridge-hack soon to be revealed) I know how to make a great porridge
(Even the producer approved her know-how)
I heard you say mmm!
I heard you say mmm!
(Can't believe it's already 4th plate...)
(Empty)

(Goosebumps)
Where did it all go...?
(Title of the piece) Mushrooms Surrounding Beef
(What a beauty...!)
(Cleared 4th one)
You should get a refill!!!
(Scolding the other hand for not working...)
I can't wait to get chopped noodles
After the next plate, I'm going to get the noodles
And you know how many plates went in here
(What will it taste like...?) The broth would've got richer in taste!
It got less spicy at the start
And the rich and savory taste just hits at the end...!
Didn't we have a lot of mushrooms at first?
(It was there...but...) I remember we had heaps...
(It's gone...) But it's almost gone now

(Year-end gathering party of mushrooms) I never ate this many mushrooms before!
(It's not a broth anymore, more like an extract...!)
(Adding the 5th plate...)
In it goes!
(Edited out the cooking part)
(Included in the menu) The noodles...
I ordered 1 serving and it sure looks small
(I'm craving rice more than noodles today...) But since I'm having porridge later
I think this will do for now
(Stay tuned!) And I know the legit way to make a porridge
(The potatoes are on point...! The potatoes are great too, wish I had a separate plate of it
This one's for
the noodles!
(The beef she's been saving)
(The owner) My gosh, enjoy yourself, please
It's really great!

(You win...LOL)
Have some more if you want to!
(LOLOLOLOL)
(Rubs)
(Another Tzuyang moment...) It's all over my sweater!
I wore a red one on purpose today
(Going for the niche...?) But it all got on the white area
I wonder if it's all cooked
It does take some time to cook chopped noodles
And this one's really thick
It's even thicker than udon...!
This can't be the chopped noodles!
And it's great...!
(I should've ordered more...LOL)
I think it's done!
Let's get some

(You sure this is chopped noodles...?) It's just like handmade udon noodles!
It really looks like one
It's got that...
Unique chewiness I guess?
It's really great
And it's about time we had porridge
(Let's see her porridge now...!) I'll show you how to make a great porridge
(Porridge tutorial)
First, get all the mushrooms out
And you should mash
(Porridge hack step 1) all the potatoes that you've been saving
(The thickness matters the most!) The broth should be super thick
Without any extra broth!
(Time to get delicious...)
(It's complete) It's all mashed
(Porridge hack step 2. Cut the beef into small pieces and get it in)

If this was frozen meat,
you can get them into pieces easily with a plastic bag
(Done) There we go!
- Are you making porridge? - Yeap!
(How will it be?)
(The beef turned into powder...) It should be all minced like this
This looks like baby food!!
I'm telling you, it's great!!
(I'll prove it to you soon...)
We need more rice!!
(Extra rice)
That looks nice
(It's not aesthetically pleasing...) I can tell it's already tasty
(But it came out well) It's great!
I always make this porridge...
(Already gone through trials and errors) Every time I go to

Deungchon Shabu-shabu franchise
Awesome!
The texture of mashed potatoes,
the beef,
and runny rice
blends so well together
It's really great! The mashed potatoes are just on point
Wanna try some?
(Will he like it as well...?)
Mmm!!!!
(Approved it) I heard you say MMM!!
(The chef looks quite satisfied)
- It tastes like Indian cuisine - I know, right?
(Getting busy with his hands...)
- I told you it's great?! - (I never doubted you ma'am...LOL)
It's really great!

(And it didn't last long...)
(It literally disappeared in seconds) I can make porridges disappear in seconds!
(Cleared it)
That's just amazing...
(How about a warm shabu-shabu on a cold winter day?) Why not try shabu-shabu for this winter?!
Thanks for another great meal!
(An alley full of snow...?)
Hello everyone!
I'm here today
for briquette delivery volunteer hosted by Korea Volunteer Center
I couldn't really participate during the COVID-19 period
But all of the honorary ambassadors and staff members are here today
to carry out the volunteer work
(Despite harsh weather, they all gathered up for a good cause)
(Sharing the warmth in another neighborhood)
(Briquette delivery volunteer with honorary ambassadors) Let's all share and love!!

The volunteers today donated 2,700 briquettes to Coal Briquettes for Neighbors in Korea HQ
And delivered 1,800 briquettes ourselves
Thank you!
- Careful now, it's heavy - Okay!
(Singer Jeong Yu Jin) I volunteered today wishing I could
make someone's winter a bit warmer
(Jang So Bin) I hope they stay warm this winter
(We hope all of them could) Thinking this could be the fuel to keep someone warm
(spend a warm winter) It really feels great
(The first delivery is complete!)
(It's 200 briquettes for 9 houses) We're headed for the next house
(The volunteers not only donate but do volunteer!) We are handing out the briquettes
that came from our donations
I think I'll remember today for the joy of sharing and the snowy weather
(The ambassadors split up into groups)
(Former baseball player Yang Joon-hyuk)

(Streamer Deokja)
(And the final delivery made by Team Tzuyang)
(Along with 1,800 briquettes, we delivered daily necessities as well)
That's so cool!
Thank you!
Thank you so much!!
My gosh, so cute!
(I'll stay warm this winter) Awww!
(Every volunteer looked so happy)
Introducing another honorary ambassador, it's Poppin Juno
Hello everyone, this is Poppin Juno!
(Briquette moves?!) I'll show you some briquette moves
(There's the step)
(Down we go)
(He's about to sweep all the snow in Samseong-dong)
(Spin)

(We're glad we could share) It's great that I get to meet Tzuyang
(our love finally after COVID-19 restrictions) and deliver these briquettes as well
(Putting every ounce of her energy as well)
(And the delivery is done!)
(The mic is off)
(I guess she's asking when she got the mark)
(Another item to the collection) I didn't recognize you with the mask!
(The mascot of the volunteer campaign, Tan) Thanks for attending this event this year as well
Thanks for having me
(Wrapping up this year with warm people)
(We hope this continues next year as well)
I hope this year went well for you as well
And best wishes for another great year of 2023
Happy new year everyone!
(We really had a fantastic year thanks to you)
(Happy new year everyone!)
